name: Microwave Cone Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownie mix according to package instructions.
2. Pour brownie mix into each ice cream cone, filling about 3/4 full.
3. Place the cones in the microwave and nuke for 2 minutes.
4. Prepare frosting according to package instructions and frost the cone cakes.
Note: For first-time preparation, try microwaving one cone cake to gauge how much batter to use and cooking time. To transport, cut an egg carton in half and cover the bottom portion with foil. Poke holes through the foil into each egg slot. These are perfect for busy moms and great for birthday parties at school or other events. When I bring them to my boys' school functions, they disappear quickly. They're also fun for kids to make.
